title: Senior Plant Manager at EPC Industrie

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at EPC Industrie
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? EPC Industrie in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
